import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.3):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed_dim = embed_dim
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

        self.interaction_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills * 2 + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=0)
        self.input_norm = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(
            embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0
        )
        for name, param in self.lstm.named_parameters():
            if 'bias' in name:
                n = param.size(0)
                param.data[n // 4:n // 2].fill_(1.0)

        self.output_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths=None):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        interact = skill_ids * 2 + corrects + 1
        x = self.interaction_embed(interact)
        x = self.input_norm(x)
        x = self.dropout(x)

        if lengths is not None:
            lengths_cpu = lengths.cpu()
            sorted_lengths, sorted_idx = torch.sort(lengths_cpu, descending=True)
            x_sorted = x[sorted_idx]
            sorted_lengths = sorted_lengths.clamp(min=1)
            packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(x_sorted, sorted_lengths, batch_first=True)
            packed_out, _ = self.lstm(packed)
            h_sorted, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(packed_out, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
            _, unsort_idx = torch.sort(sorted_idx)
            h = h_sorted[unsort_idx]
        else:
            h, _ = self.lstm(x)

        h = self.output_norm(h)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h[:, :-1])
        return torch.sigmoid(logits)
